core.label: Crystal Fundamentals
core.description: Ruby-inspired syntax with static typing and compiled performance.

topics.label: Installation & Playground
topics.description: Install Crystal and use the online playground. Crystal compiles to native code via LLVM.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: Type inference, union types, nilable types (String?). Crystal is statically typed but feels dynamic.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/elsif/else, case/when, while, until. Similar to Ruby.

topics.label: Methods & Blocks
topics.description: def methods, blocks with do/end or {}, and iterators. Ruby-like syntax.

topics.label: Classes & Structs
topics.description: Classes (reference), structs (value), inheritance, and modules for mixins.

topics.label: Generics
topics.description: Generic classes and methods for type-safe reusable code.

topics.label: Concurrency (Fibers & Channels)
topics.description: Lightweight fibers and CSP-style channels. Inspired by Go goroutines.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: begin/rescue/ensure and union types for errors. Exception-based error handling.

topics.label: Shards (Package Manager)
topics.description: Manage dependencies with shard.yml. Shards is Crystal's package manager.
